title: 100 Grip Seal Freezer Bags *CHOOSE YOUR SIZE*| Strong Resealable and Reusable Clear Plastic Zip Lock Bags |Used for Food Storage Jewellery Medicine (2.25 x 3 Inch)
features: Fully Smell-Proof & Leak-Proof Design – Our resealable plastic bags provide an airtight, smell-proof seal, keeping odours locked in. Whether you're storing food, herbs, or accessories, these grip seal bags prevent leaks and maintain freshness.

Available in Multiple Sizes for Any Need – Choose from a variety of sizes to fit your needs, from small baggies for jewellery and pills to large freezer bags for meats, vegetables, and bulk storage. These clear plastic bags are designed to suit every household and business requirement.

Food-Grade & Freezer-Safe – Made from BPA-free, food-grade plastic, our zip lock bags are perfect for storing snacks, produce, and meal prep items. These food bags are freezer-safe, keeping your food fresh while preventing freezer burn.

Reusable & Durable – Crafted from premium PE material, our zip bags are tear-resistant, waterproof, and reusable, making them a sustainable choice. These resealable plastic bags are strong enough for everyday use at home, work, or on the go.

Versatile Storage for Home & Business – Ideal for storing food, organising crafts, securing travel essentials, sorting screws, or protecting jewellery, these grip seal bags are a must-have. Their transparent design ensures easy identification, making them the perfect clear plastic bags for efficient storage.
